steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: Start with $$2p+275=325$$ Subtract $275$ from both sides: $$2p=50$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is $25$. It checks because $2(25)+275=50+275=325$. The other choices would make $2p$ either too small or too large to reach $325$ after adding $275$.
